{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320174648A95D39AAD8512922A0C3"}"},"total":96},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7603689736429683481","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔流畅，内容吸引人。贴近生活。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770375987,"group_id":"7591343476495617048","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz4i/2IgJxXv5mp1yQ7hiBpMR19pPhahke4TsXTBLFAQ","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1018592217555674","user_name":"硕果累累的布鲁"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1018592217555674","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7591343476495617048","book_info":{"abstract":"【年上阿姨】【御姐】【校花】【白月光】【修罗场】
【多女无主，纯爽文，有图，懂的都懂】
前世，叶白被妻子柳如烟和发小高亦凡坑害，含恨而死。
重新睁眼后，他发现自己回到了高亦凡婚礼之上。
面对高亦凡那清冷傲娇的未婚妻，以及柳如烟那童颜巨雷的母亲.....
叶白嘴角逐渐勾起一抹笑容....
与此同时，他居然觉醒了离婚逆袭系统！？
【三十六岁的你罹患艾滋病，已然时日无多....】
【追了十几年的白月光柳如烟害你得了艾滋病，从小玩到大的发小高亦凡其实一直把你当成傻逼。】
【你觉得自己的人生就是个笑话.....】
【但往者不可谏，来者犹可追，你，是否有勇气在这而立之年，开始逆袭人生？】
人在大二，离婚逆袭系统早到二十年。
重回二十岁的叶白看了一眼面板上的系统任务，不由陷入沉思。
嗯.......这系统似乎来早了？
未来的岳母，未来的大嫂，还未黑化的青梅，全是年轻版本，一个个出现的时候。
系统似乎有点变质了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7c555839c882adf4b9361110065a8878","author":"我真不色","author_id":"","book_id":"7591343476495617048","book_name":"仇人新婚醉酒，我入洞房当新郎！","book_short_name":"离婚逆袭系统：重生仇人婚礼现场，彻底疯狂","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7591343611829027352","read_count":"55028","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"339441"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.1","serial_count":"164","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,重生,多女主,校花,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/08a69d176b076261c74ce6f04e3f3fd6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779184008&x-signature=gt7UzryGbogSup07kvlCikJAol0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"207163520980796","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"73"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320174648A95D39AAD8512922A0C3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"re
